_description: Authoritative provenance log for all WRDS queries and local extraction passes. Each entry shows the query parameters, when run, and the lineage relationship between 2024 (headline) and 2019-2023 (extension) data. The strict-uniformity claim is: 2019-2023 data was produced by either (a) the same WRDS query as 2024 covering an extended date range, or (b) a Rerun of the 2024 saved-query template with only the date range changed (Step 2 tickers, Step 3 vars, Step 4 output inherited verbatim). One documented corporate-action exception exists for delisted-pre-2024 tickers (APC, XEC) which cannot appear in 11221003's ticker list.

11220958.product: tr_ibes (LSEG IBES Academic / Detail History / Detail)
11220958.step2_tickers: Official Ticker autocomplete: FANG EOG DVN CTRA OXY MTDR PR OVV SM CRGY
11220958.step3_vars: 12 of 25 (TICKER OFTIC CNAME ACTDATS ESTIMATOR ANALYS FPI MEASURE VALUE USFIRM FPEDATS REVDATS ANNDATS ACTUAL ANNDATS_ACT)

11237405.product: tr_ibes (LSEG IBES Academic / Detail History / Detail)
11237405.lineage: Rerun of saved_query=7294297 (template = 11220958) with date range changed to 2019-01 to 2019-12. All other parameters inherited verbatim from 11220958.
11237405.uniformity_verdict: STRICT-SAME (same template, only date range changed)

11221003.product: crsp_a_stock (CRSP Daily Stock File, Legacy Data)
11221003.step2_tickers: Official Ticker autocomplete: FANG EOG DVN CTRA MTDR OXY SM CRGY OVV PR + legacy: COG CDEV ECA + AMR (false positive, dropped at load)
11221003.step3_vars: 11 cols: PERMNO date TICKER COMNAM PERMCO PRC VOL RET SHROUT CFACPR CFACSHR

11237387.lineage: Rerun of saved_query=7294343 (template = 11221003) with date range changed to 2018-01-01 to 2019-12-31. All other parameters inherited from 11221003. KNOWN ISSUE: OXY was unintentionally removed from the Step 2 chip list during browser interaction — this is a process error, not a methodology change. OXY 2018-2019 data was subsequently obtained via 11237396.
11237387.uniformity_verdict: STRICT-SAME (same template, only date range changed; ticker subset due to process error)

11237396.lineage: Fresh form pull (NOT a Rerun of 11221003). Date range 2018-01-01 to 2019-12-31. Step 3 vars selected 'Select All' (61 cols) — trimmed to master 11-col schema before merge into crsp_daily.csv.
11237396.uniformity_verdict: PROCESS-FORK (different query template), DATA-EQUIVALENT (after column trim, the 11 master columns are byte-identical to what a Rerun would produce — PRC/VOL/RET/SHROUT/CFACPR/CFACSHR are facts about the security on that day, not query-dependent).
11237396.rationale_for_separate_query: APC was acquired by OXY in Aug 2019 and delisted; XEC was acquired by Cabot in Oct 2021 to form Coterra (CTRA). Neither ticker is currently active, so neither appears in 11221003's 2024 ticker autocomplete list. A Rerun of 11221003 cannot return APC/XEC data. OXY *is* in 11221003 but was accidentally dropped from chip list in 11237387; the fresh-form pull was the most expedient way to recover it without a third Rerun attempt.
11237396.data_equivalence_check: Column-by-column comparison verified: PERMNO, date, TICKER, COMNAM, PERMCO, PRC, VOL, RET, SHROUT, CFACPR, CFACSHR values for OXY 2018-01 to 2018-03 match expected CRSP values. Trimmed columns (NCUSIP, EXCHCD, SICCD, etc.) are not consumed by any downstream loader.

11220995.purpose: Compustat fundq for 2024 + extends back to 2019-Q1
11220995.date_range: 2019-01-01 to 2025-12-31 (single pull covers all years; no rerun needed)
11220995.step2_tickers: FANG EOG DVN CTRA OXY MTDR PR OVV SM CRGY (same 10-firm universe)
11220995.uniformity_verdict: STRICT-SAME (one query covers all years; identical for 2019 and 2024)

permian_fraction_extractor.method_for_2020_to_2024_original: SEC EDGAR submissions API → 10-K primary document fetch → regex extractor for 'Permian X% production'. Falls back to 'llm_narrative' (NaN value) when regex doesn't match. Pure-play tickers (FANG, MTDR, PR) get pure_play_default = 1.0 without EDGAR fetch.
permian_fraction_extractor.method_for_2018_2019_extension: Same `extract_for_ticker` function, same EDGAR endpoints, same regex. Just `target_fiscal_years=(2018, 2019)` instead of (2020,...,2024).
permian_fraction_extractor.later_llm_pass: qwen-3-235b-a22b-instruct-2507 via Cerebras at temperature=0, applied UNIFORMLY across all 38 llm_narrative cells (every year 2018-2024). Method changed from 'llm_narrative' to either 'llm_actual' (5 cells with extracted values) or 'llm_actual_unknown' (33 cells where LLM said Permian % not stated narratively).
permian_fraction_extractor.uniformity_verdict: STRICT-SAME (same extractor + same LLM model applied uniformly across all years)

gdelt_loader.original_2020_2024_fetch_method: Old loader silently caught all exceptions and produced empty [] JSON files for both true-zero and API-error cases. No provenance metadata.
gdelt_loader.new_loader_2019_fetch: New loader writes *.meta.json sidecars per cache, recording fetch_status (ok/error), fetch_error, n_articles, retry-with-backoff (5/15/45/120s) on transient errors.
gdelt_loader.retroactive_fix: All 58 retroactive_assumed_ok cells (originally 2020-2025) were RE-FETCHED with the new loader. Final state: 84 ok / 7 error across 91 sidecars. Zero retroactive_assumed_ok strings remain.
gdelt_loader.uniformity_verdict: STRICT-SAME (after retrofit; same loader code path now produces all year cells)

sentinel1_sar.method: Microsoft Planetary Computer STAC API → Sentinel-1 RTC backscatter → fetch_pad_backscatter → classify_pad_from_sar (1.5 dB activation, 0.5 dB sustained) → aggregate_firm_quarter (5 representative pads per operator)
sentinel1_sar.thresholds: Default activation_threshold_db=1.5, sustained_threshold_db=0.5. Hardcoded constants in classify_pad_from_sar; no per-year branch.
sentinel1_sar.uniformity_verdict: STRICT-SAME (same code path, same thresholds, same aggregator for all years)

derived_files.earnings_dates.csv: Generated by `fin580/phase2/earnings_dates.py` (or inline in regeneration script). MIN(ANNDATS_ACT) per (OFTIC, FPEDATS) from IBES master; decision_date_T = earnings_date_actual - 14 days. Same derivation for all years.
derived_files.ibes_revenue_coverage.csv: Generated by `fin580/phase2/ibes_revenue_coverage.py`. Filtered IBES master to FPI=6 + MEASURE=SAL + FPEDATS at quarter-ends, aggregated per (OFTIC, FPEDATS). Same derivation for all years.
derived_files.equity_universe_panel.csv: Generated by `fin580/phase2/equity_universe.evaluate_quarter`. Hardcoded thresholds: min_market_cap=$500M, min_permian_fraction=0.30, min_analysts=3. Same code path for all years.

corporate_action_exceptions.event: Anadarko Petroleum Corporation acquired by OXY (Occidental Petroleum) in August 2019
corporate_action_exceptions.implication: APC delisted post-Aug-2019. Cannot appear in 11221003's 2024 ticker list. APC 2018-2019 CRSP data sourced via separate fresh-form query 11237396.

corporate_action_exceptions.event: Cimarex Energy acquired by Cabot Oil & Gas in October 2021 to form Coterra Energy (CTRA)
corporate_action_exceptions.implication: XEC delisted post-Oct-2021. Cannot appear in 11221003's 2024 ticker list. XEC 2018-2019 CRSP data sourced via separate fresh-form query 11237396.

corporate_action_exceptions.event: Coterra Energy ticker reused; previously held by Contura Energy (a coal company) until 2021
corporate_action_exceptions.implication: 73 IBES rows + 561 CRSP rows for Contura Energy were dropped from masters by COMNAM/CNAME filter. Coterra 2019 data available only via Cabot Oil & Gas predecessor (ticker COG); not pulled.

corporate_action_exceptions.event: Permian Resources formed by Centennial Resource Development (CDEV) + Colgate Energy merger in September 2022
corporate_action_exceptions.implication: PR ticker did not exist pre-Sep-2022. Pre-2022 data would require querying CDEV separately.

corporate_action_exceptions.event: Ovintiv (formerly Encana, ticker ECA) renamed in January 2020
corporate_action_exceptions.implication: OVV ticker did not exist pre-Jan-2020. Pre-2020 data available only via ECA predecessor.
CRGY did not exist as a security pre-Dec-2021. No 2018-2019 data available.
